label: California deadline for a provider to release medical records
source: California Health & Safety Code §123110 (approx; verify current)
notes: Verify the exact current deadline and any category-specific exceptions before relying on it for a dispute.

label: Typical deadline to appeal a California health insurance denial
value: 180 days for internal appeal (varies by plan type)
source: CA Dept of Managed Health Care / DMHC (approx; verify current)
notes: Medicare/Medicaid/employer self-funded plans can have different rules and shorter windows — verify which type of plan applies.

label: General adult protein intake guideline (RDA baseline)
value: ~0.8g per kg body weight/day baseline; commonly higher (1.0-1.2g/kg+) recommended for older adults
source: NIH / USDA Dietary Guidelines (approx; verify current edition)
notes: The 0.8g/kg RDA is a MINIMUM to prevent deficiency, not necessarily an optimal target — especially for older adults or anyone resistance training. A dietitian can tailor an actual number.
